name_en: Fort of Saint Michael the Archangel
name_local: Fort of Saint Michael the Archangel

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the São Miguel Chapel is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a Capela de São Miguel?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH kuh-PEH-luh DIH SOWN mee-GEHL?
phrases.cultural_note: A Capela de São Miguel é uma capela histórica do século XVI dedicada a São Miguel Arcanjo, localizada no interior do forte.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, a capela fica dentro do forte.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, AH kuh-PEH-luh FEE-kuh DAYNGT-roo DOO FAW-ruh-tih.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, the chapel is inside the fort.

responses.english: Good morning, the chapel is inside the fort.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, AH kuh-PEH-luh FEE-kuh DAYNGT-roo DOO FAW-ruh-tih.
responses.local: Bom dia, a capela fica dentro do forte.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the historic cannons are displayed
phrases.text_local: Onde estão expostos os canhões históricos?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih ihsh-TOWN ehsh-PAWS-toosh OOSH kahn-NYOHNYSH eesh-TAW-ree-koosh?
phrases.cultural_note: These artillery pieces are arranged to demonstrate the fort's original defensive layout against maritime threats.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the São Miguel Chapel is
phrases.text_local: Onde está localizada a Capela de São Miguel?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih ehs-TAH loo-kuh-lee-ZAH-duh AH kuh-PEH-luh DIH SOWN mee-GEHL?
phrases.cultural_note: The chapel is a small, historic religious site integrated into the fort's original structure, often used for local ceremonies.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, no interior do forte. Pergunte na bilheteira.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, NOO een-tih-REEOHR DOO FAW-ruh-tih. peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih NUH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, inside the fort. Ask at the ticket office.

responses.english: Good morning, inside the fort. Ask at the ticket office.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, NOO een-tih-REEOHR DOO FAW-ruh-tih. peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih NUH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh.
responses.local: Bom dia, no interior do forte. Pergunte na bilheteira.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the historic cannons are displayed
phrases.cultural_note: Os canhões fazem parte da Muralha Atlântica, uma fortificação costeira da Segunda Guerra Mundial.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the North viewpoint is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica o Miradouro do Norte?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW mee-ruh-DOHW-roo DOO NAW-ruh-tih?
phrases.cultural_note: The North Viewpoint offers stunning views of the giant waves.

likely_response.translation_en: Follow the wall, on the right.

responses.english: Follow the wall, on the right.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the historic cannons are
phrases.text_local: Onde ficam os canhões históricos do forte?
phrases.pronunciation: ON-jee fee-KAHN oosh (links to next) kah-NYOYNS is-TOH-ree-kooz doo FOR-chee
phrases.cultural_note: The cannons are positioned along the historic Atlantic-facing fortifications, typical of coastal defense structures.

likely_response.local: Os canhões históricos estão junto à Muralha Atlântica.
likely_response.pronunciation: OOSH kahn-NYOHNYSH eesh-TAW-ree-koosh ihsh-TOWN ZHOONNG-too AH moo-RAH-lyuh uht-LAHNNG-tee-kuh.
likely_response.translation_en: The historic cannons are near the Atlantic wall.

responses.english: The historic cannons are near the Atlantic wall.
responses.phonetic: OOSH kahn-NYOHNYSH eesh-TAW-ree-koosh ihsh-TOWN ZHOONNG-too AH moo-RAH-lyuh uht-LAHNNG-tee-kuh.
responses.local: Os canhões históricos estão junto à Muralha Atlântica.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the North viewpoint is located
phrases.text_local: Onde se encontra o Miradouro do Norte?
phrases.cultural_note: Offers panoramic views of the famous Nazaré waves and the fishing harbor, a key spot for photographers.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, na extremidade norte, junto ao farol.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, NUH ehst-rih-mee-DAH-dih NAW-ruh-tih, ZHOONNG-too OW fuh-RAWL.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, at the northern end, next to the lighthouse.

responses.english: Good morning, at the northern end, next to the lighthouse.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, NUH ehst-rih-mee-DAH-dih NAW-ruh-tih, ZHOONNG-too OW fuh-RAWL.
responses.local: Bom dia, na extremidade norte, junto ao farol.
